data.title: As a brainstorm facilitator, I can suggest relates_to links when cross-epic artifact overlap is discovered
data.description:
## Description

**What**: Extend brainstorm's Part C scan to suggest relates_to links to open (not closed/archived) epics when cross-epic artifact overlap is discovered during gap analysis. The suggestion is presented to the user for approval before creating the link.
**Why**: Cross-epic coordination is currently invisible during brainstorm. When two epics modify the same shared artifacts, they should be linked so that sprint drift detection can catch coordination gaps. Surfacing these links during gap analysis catches overlap at the earliest possible moment.
**Scope**:
- IN: During Part C gap analysis, identify open epics whose file impact overlaps with the current epic's artifacts. Suggest relates_to links with rationale. Present suggestions to user for approval before link creation. Filter by status=open at suggestion time. Create approved links via ticket CLI.
- OUT: Automatic link creation without user approval, recursive overlap detection, drift detection logic (S1), closed/archived epic suggestions

## Done Definitions

- When this story is complete, brainstorm's Part C scan suggests relates_to links to open epics when cross-epic artifact overlap is discovered during gap analysis
  ← Satisfies: "Brainstorm's Part C scan suggests relates_to links to open (not closed/archived) epics when cross-epic artifact overlap is discovered during gap analysis"
- When this story is complete, the relates_to link suggestion is presented to the user for approval before creating the link
  ← Satisfies: "The relates_to link suggestion is presented to the user for approval before creating the link"
- When this story is complete, only open (not closed/archived) epics are suggested as relates_to link targets
  ← Satisfies: "suggests relates_to links to open (not closed/archived) epics" (SC3 open filter)
- When this story is complete, unit tests are written and passing for all new or modified logic

## Considerations

- [Reliability] Part C scan from fed2-b1ce must be delivered before this story can be implemented — depends on fed2-b1ce epic
- [Testing] User approval interaction should be testable via mock or scripted approval flow
- [Maintainability] relates_to suggestion logic should integrate into the existing Part C flow rather than adding a separate scan pass
